case_title: LUCILLE V GIBBS VS. ARMANDO DANIEL DOROSA

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIBBS, LUCILLE V AS TO DEFENDANT DOROSA, ARMANDO DANIEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST LUCILLE V GIBBS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-25-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-09-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-27-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
